prompt.content:
Forma wants to understand most and least resource efficient categories. Based on the store wise headcount data, provide the category that has the highest sales/rep and the category that has the lowest sales/rep. What is the delta between them in $/sales rep?

Share the output in console. Round all the calculations to nearest integer.

rubrics.name: States that the highest Sales/Rep Category is Storage & Organization (ver_aef3ecfcbf654109a9291801fd4645b9)

messages.content: States that the highest Sales/Rep Category is Storage & Organization.

rubrics.name: States that the lowest sales/rep category is Office (ver_6ebfcfdfb70f43fb9b99d3267bbffb2a)

messages.content: States that the lowest sales/rep category is Office.

rubrics.name: States that the delta between highest and lowest sales/rep categories is... (ver_8c167061ade6464d8b56bb3ebb66288a)

messages.content: States that the delta between highest and lowest sales/rep categories is $2,460 per sales rep.

rubrics.name: States that the delta between highest and lowest sales/rep categories is... (ver_8c167061ade6464d8b56bb3ebb66288a)

messages.content: States that the delta between highest and lowest sales/rep categories is anything other than $2,460 per sales rep.

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
Resource Efficiency Analysis

Highest Sales/Rep Category: Storage & Organization
Lowest Sales/Rep Category: Office

Delta between Highest and Lowest: $2,460 per sales rep
